field9: Monitoring period 01/01/2025-30/06/2025 for Verra VCS 3599 (Grouped Projects for Safe Drinking Water for Schools in Viet Nam). Parameter values and BE/LE/ER totals are taken directly from the project ER calculation workbook VCS-ERS-Project-3599-01JAN2025-30JUN2025.xlsx (sheet 'Total ER') and match the Verra Registry issuance for this period. The AMS-III.AV. parameters (field12-field18) are back-calculated from the ERS BE total so that the on-chain calculate_report_fields block re-derives BE=162,241.14 exactly via the real equations: SEC=357.48/nwb=3574.8 kJ/L; BE_y=QPW_y*m*X_boil*SEC*(BL_fuel*f_i*EF_fuel*1e-9)=162,241.14 tCO2e; ER_y=BE_y-PE_y-LE_y=154,125.14 tCO2e. WQ gate: 95/100=0.95>=0.90 passes.
